title: Photography & Video Release
description: Release permitting event hosts to photograph and record participants, using media for commercial advertising.
whatsCovered: Consent to be photographed and recorded on video
Irrevocable grant to publish media for promotional advertising
Waiver of compensation or royalty rights for media use
Release of photographer/videographer from defamation claims
Applicability to minor children (with parent consent)
whenToUse: Use this media release form at conferences, workshops, or video shoots to obtain permission to use attendee recordings in marketing.

clauses.heading: PHOTOGRAPHY & VIDEO RELEASE
clauses.body: This agreement or policy (the "Agreement") is executed as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {party_a_name}, residing/located at {party_a_address} ("First Party"), and {party_b_name}, residing/located at {party_b_address} ("Second Party").

clauses.heading: 1. Core Framework
clauses.body: This agreement establishes the legal rights, bylaws, transfers, waivers, or consent structures for the Photography & Video Release. The parties agree to adhere to the terms and declarations set out below.

clauses.heading: 2. Photography Marketing Releases
clauses.body: Participant grants event organizer right to record audio/video at event: {event_name_release} and use media in advertising.

clauses.heading: General Legal Terms
clauses.body: This document constitutes the entire understanding between the parties. Any amendments must be made in writing and executed by both parties.

clauses.heading: Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can I customize this legal template?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit this template using the online editor, and add custom schedules or exhibits.

faq.question: Is this agreement binding?
faq.answer: Yes, once signed by all parties, it becomes a legally binding contract under state laws.
